infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Obsy uses your microphone to record voice mood notes.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Obsy uses your camera to capture photos for your entries and topics.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Obsy accesses your photo library so you can attach images to your entries and topics.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Obsy saves images to your photo library when you export them.
